title: stevia neurophylla
intro: Stevia neurophylla is a plant species within the Stevia genus, known for its sweet-tasting leaves that are up to 300 times sweeter than sugar. Medicinally, Stevia neurophylla is used to reduce inflammation and combat bacterial infections due to its antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Stevia neurophylla include lowering blood pressure, aiding in weight management, and potentially reducing blood sugar levels. Herbal preparations of Stevia neurophylla often come in the form of supplements, teas, or powders that can be added to food and beverages, making it a popular natural sweetener.
